description: Toolbar layout refactor and icon visual balancing. Reorder Row 1 buttons into logical groups with dividers, and replace Unicode icons with SVG components with precise Circle/Rhombus visual size matching.

userStories.title: Replace Unicode tool icons with SVG components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all tool icons to use SVG instead of Unicode characters so that rendering is consistent across Windows, Mac, and Linux.
acceptanceCriteria: Create SVG icon components for Rectangle, Rectangle-Solid, Line, Arrow in UnifiedToolbar.tsx following existing pattern (18x18 display, 0 0 24 24 viewBox, currentColor stroke, fill none)
Eraser icon remains unchanged (already an SVG component)
TOOLS array icon field references SVG component functions for Rectangle, Rectangle-Solid, Line, Arrow
Icon rendering in button simplified to always use <tool.icon /> since all icons are now functions
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add SVG Ellipse and Rhombus icon components with visual size balancing
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Circle and Rhombus icons to appear the same visual size so the toolbar feels balanced.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Ellipse SVG icon component with <circle> using r=9 (viewBox 0 0 24 24) for outline circle
Create Ellipse-Solid SVG icon component with <circle r=9> and fill=currentColor for solid circle
Create Rhombus SVG icon component with diamond path for outline rhombus
Create Rhombus-Solid SVG icon component with diamond path and fill=currentColor for solid rhombus
Circle and Rhombus icons appear visually equal in size within the toolbar buttons
Update TOOLS array to reference the new SVG components for ellipse, ellipse-solid, rhombus, rhombus-solid
currentColor inheritance ensures active/disabled state coloring still works correctly
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Reorder toolbar buttons and insert dividers in Row 1
userStories.description: As a user, I want the toolbar buttons grouped logically (Tools | Corners | Group/Ungroup | Image) with visual dividers so I can find tools faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Eraser remains in TOOLS array as last item (no data structure change)
A divider (1px wide, 24px tall, theme.divider color) is rendered immediately after TOOLS.map() block (between Eraser and SharpCorner)
SharpCorner and RoundCorner buttons are adjacent with no divider between them
A divider is rendered between RoundCorner and Group buttons
Group and Ungroup buttons are adjacent with no divider between them
A divider is rendered between Ungroup and Insert Image button
Insert Image is now the rightmost button in Row 1
All dividers use theme.divider for color (light: #f0e4c0, dark: #444444) ensuring dark mode compatibility
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
